title: VGFlow Workflow Replay Evidence v1.0
description: R7 Task 5 (G9) — multi-actor workflow runtime replay evidence. Written to ${PHASE_DIR}/.runs/<WF-NN>.replay.json by scripts/lib/workflow_replay.py. Consumed by scripts/validators/verify-workflow-replay.py at review verdict layer (defense-in-depth vs R7 Task 4 build-side gate).

workflow_id.description: Workflow identifier matching WORKFLOW-SPECS/<WF-NN>.md filename stem

schema_version.description: Pinned to v1.0; bump on breaking schema change

replay_started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when replay began

replay_completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when replay finished (success or failure)

actors_used.description: Distinct role names used during replay (e.g. ['user', 'admin', 'manager'])

deployed_url.description: Base URL the replay drove (e.g. https://staging.example.com). Null when replay is mock/dry-run.

execution_mode.description: live = actual Playwright MCP browser; mock = unit-test stub; dry-run = plan emitted but not executed

steps.description: Ordered list of replay steps mirroring WORKFLOW-SPECS steps[]

cross_role_visibility.description: Per-role checks confirming a state change made by actor A is visible to actor B

authz_negative_paths.description: Wrong-role transition attempts; expected to be rejected (403/401)

side_effects_captured.description: Optional capture of side effects (notifications, emails, webhooks). Free-form; reviewers cross-check against WORKFLOW-SPECS state_machine.transitions[].side_effects

overall_verdict.description: PASSED = every required check green; FAILED = blocking failure; PARTIAL = some non-critical checks deferred (e.g. live MCP unavailable); SKIPPED = workflow excluded by override

blocking_failures.description: Human-readable summary of failures that drove FAILED verdict

notes.description: Replay narration / TODO markers for partial executions

cred_switch.description: True when this step changed actor (cred_switch_marker honored)

verdict.description: PASSED = denial occurred as expected; FAILED = wrong-role action succeeded; SKIPPED = couldn't probe
